prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_1: large brown rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_4: small gray metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_9: large gray rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0541] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0542] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0543] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0544] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0545] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0546] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_9 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0547] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0548] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0549] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0550] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0551] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0552] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0553] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0554] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0555] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0556] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0557] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0558] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0559] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0560] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
